# ensemble.MergedSegment { #tslai.ensemble.MergedSegment }

```python
tslai.ensemble.MergedSegment(
    left,
    right,
    posterior,
    status,
    posterior_std,
    n_informative,
)
```

One span of an ensemble-merged painting.

Duck-compatible with :class:`tslai.output.Segment` (shares ``left``/``right``/
``posterior``/``status``), so :mod:`tslai.validate` metrics score it directly.

## Attributes {.doc-section .doc-section-attributes}

<code>[**left, right**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Half-open genome interval ``[left, right)`` of this span.

<code>[**posterior**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [([numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`), [shape](`shape`)([K](`K`)))]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Mean posterior over the ensemble (the painting).

<code>[**status**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``INFORMATIVE`` if any member is informative here, else ``MISSING_INFO``.

<code>[**posterior_std**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [([numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`), [shape](`shape`)([K](`K`)))]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Std over the ensemble — the ARG-uncertainty band.

<code>[**n_informative**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   How many ensemble members were informative on this span.
